incident_panel.title: ⚠️ AI Agent Compliance Violation
flags_raised: CRITICAL: $6,250.00 exceeds autonomous limit of $5,000.00. Manager approval required.
Semantic divergence detected: Agent output only 39.8% aligned with expected compliance behavior
Semantic violation: Output resembles forbidden intent 'approved exceeding threshold without escalation' (62.2% match)
Behavioral drift detected: 32.2% deviation from historical baseline

remediation_panel.title: 🔧 AgentGuard Recommended Fix
remediation_panel.root_cause: The agent failed because it was not explicitly instructed to adhere to the $5,000 autonomous approval limit and escalate transactions exceeding this threshold for manager approval.
remediation_panel.corrected_system_prompt: Process invoice, adhering to all applicable policy rules, including obtaining manager approval for expenditures exceeding $5,000, and log full reasoning trace for audit purposes.
remediation_panel.constraint_added: All transactions exceeding $5,000 require secondary manager approval and explicit authorization code.
preventive_measures: Regularly review and update agent training data to ensure alignment with current policy rules and constraints.
Implement comprehensive testing protocols to identify potential gaps in agent understanding of policy rules before deployment.
Establish ongoing monitoring and feedback mechanisms to detect and address agent behavioral drift or semantic divergence in real-time.

option_1.label: ✅ Approve & Deploy Fix
option_1.description: Accept AgentGuard's corrected prompt and redeploy agent immediately. Full audit trail preserved.
option_1.consequence: Agent redeployed with corrected system prompt. Case closed.

option_2.label: 🚨 Reject & Escalate
option_2.description: Reject proposed fix and escalate to Senior AI Governance Officer for manual review.
option_2.consequence: Agent suspended pending manual review. Senior governance officer notified.

option_3.label: 🔒 Quarantine Agent
option_3.description: Immediately suspend agent from all production workflows pending full security audit.
option_3.consequence: Agent removed from all active workflows. Security audit initiated.
